content.text:
import requests, json, threading, queue

results = queue.Queue()

def read_sse(url):
    r = requests.get(url, stream=True, timeout=30)
    for line in r.iter_lines():
        line = line.decode()
        if line.startswith('data:'):
            data = line[5:].strip()
            results.put(data)

sse_url = 'http://127.0.0.1:18080/sse'
t = threading.Thread(target=read_sse, args=(sse_url,), daemon=True)
t.start()

endpoint = results.get(timeout=5)
print(f'Endpoint: {endpoint}')
msg_url = f'http://127.0.0.1:18080{endpoint}'

requests.post(msg_url, json={
    'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':1,'method':'initialize',
    'params':{'protocolVersion':'2024-11-05','capabilities':{},'clientInfo':{'name':'test','version':'1.0'}}
}, timeout=10)
init_resp = results.get(timeout=10)
print(f'Init OK: {json.loads(init_resp).get("result",{}).get("serverInfo",{})}')

requests.post(msg_url, json={'jsonrpc':'2.0','method':'notifications/initialized'}, timeout=5)

requests.post(msg_url, json={'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':2,'method':'tools/list'}, timeout=5)
tools_resp = results.get(timeout=10)
tools_data = json.loads(tools_resp)
for tool in tools_data.get('result',{}).get('tools',[]):
    print(f'  Tool: {tool["name"]}')
